reviews.review_title: Good game but no save points
reviews.review_description: I played this on an Oculus Go with the Go controller with no issues.  There are horror games with better scares, but I actually really enjoyed it.  Starts out as a haunted house and basically turns into a zombie shooter, which is where the fun begins.  The major problem and why only 3 stars is because I played for about an hour and could find no way to save the game, I thought well it must auto save, but no, when I played again, it starts at the beginning.  This is ridiculous, I will never play it again because I'm not spending an hour to get back where I was and then no idea how long it will take to get to the end.  If there is a way to save, please let me know.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. The game save feature has been added and you can continue from where you have last played by loading it from the menu. Please update to new version. After trying the new version, please inform us here. Haunted House will be updated regularly according to your comments. Thank you so much.

reviews.review_description: Good game. Not that easy to accomplish. I still have not completed all levels. I'm stuck on a level where it's hard to beat, and that's ok, I like it hard.  Graphics are good and this game can get scarry. For the low sale price, I got a great deal.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. Enjoy the game.

reviews.review_description:
I've played this on my Go and Gear VR, with the given controllers and with a gamepad
 I've found it easier to move and turn with a gamepad.  I, too find it frustrating to have to begin the game from the beginning every time to get back to where I was before.  I am also frustrated that I cannot get past the 3rd level. I usually get stuck when I cannot kill that serial killer just when I think I made it. I tried backing up, running and turning so I'm far enough away to see the green dot, but nothing I do helps. I do like that room that leads up through the floor into another area of the house ending up at the Jesus statue. I thought that was pretty cool,  but again, no matter what I try I cannot get that guy at the end. FRUSTRATING!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. The game save feature has been added and you can continue from where you have last played by loading it from the menu. Please update to new version. After trying the new version, please inform us here. Haunted House will be updated regularly according to your comments. Thank you so much.

reviews.review_description:
This game has no plot which makes it not interesting to play really. The objective to complete the level seems to be nothing more than killing enough monsters (which are all the same model). like the controls, but there are way too many bugs, and lags on my S8+. The monster animations are boring, they look poor and move very slow, it's way too easy.

I gave up and quit the game at the second level because I can't find where to go.. even though it's a very short map.

Save your money on this one.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your comment. Please update to the new version. We have a complete renewal in the new version. Added a new level. Gear VR Controls and weapon control has been changed. New animations, effects and characters were added. Game speed has been changed. We don't see a problem on S8+. We will continue updating our game according to your valuable comments. Thank you so much.

reviews.review_title: Good potential but not great execution
reviews.review_description:
Pros: Good graphics, Free roaming mechanism, some horror elements, adventure elements at the start of the game.

Cons: Unrealistic gun mechanics, slow and repetetive gameplay, No story, no objective, poor animations, not enough scary.

Overall: 4/10

developer_response.body: Thanks for your comment. Please update to the new version. We have a complete renewal in the new version. Added a new level. Gear VR Controls and weapon control has been changed. New animations, effects and characters were added. Game speed has been changed. We will continue updating our game according to your valuable comments. Thank you so much.

reviews.review_description: Wrong Scale, everything is too big, am I a giant in a Giant world? No possible immersion. The world scale need to be 1:1 to be cinsidered VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. Please update to new version. After trying the new version, please inform us here. Haunted House will be updated regularly according to your comments.

reviews.review_description: I know the motion controller is supported but can you guys add gamepad support with rotation? cause this needs gamepad support too.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We will add gamepad support on the next version.

reviews.review_description: Oculus Go-Controller not functionable to move forward, therefore it's not playable!! Dev's please patch!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. Please update to new version. After trying the new version, please inform us here. Haunted House will be updated regularly according to your comments.

reviews.review_description: I'd "HIGHLY RECOMMEND" that you purchase this game!!! Walk around this supposed abandoned house & you'll realize that your not alone. Immerse yourself in a real life horror movie, with you as the star. Be brave, as you explore mansion. The storyline feeds into many of our worst fears. The sounds alone, will heighten your sense of fear. If at anytime, you need to take a break or you need to recharge your Oculus Go, simply quit the game & it will automatically save at the closest point where you left off. When you turn the game back on, just hit the "load game" button below the start button. Its clear that the developers put a lot of time & dedication, in creating this game. "JUST DOWNLOAD THE GAME & YOU'LL AGREE"!!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. Enjoy the game.

reviews.review_description: Are you going to fix the forward motion on the Oculus Go? It currently takes me 5 minute's just to get to the first room. Also how far in for the first save point. I am pretty sure I have the latest update .

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. The game is in normal speed works and there are several savepoints in levels. Can you please email us with details at haydaraydin06@gmail.com?
